falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score drops below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score below 25 would indicate reduced volatility and market stress, contradicting the current HOLD signal which implies ongoing uncertainty.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug falls below 70%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant drop in pattern similarity would invalidate the assumption that current conditions mirror the 2024 August bottom, undermining the basis for the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5500 by [specific date]
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above this key resistance level would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
